name: Valentino
description:
• "𝐵𝑎𝑏𝑒𝑠, 𝑙𝑖𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑛, 𝑤ℎ𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑟 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑘 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑖𝑠, 𝑠𝑡𝑜𝑝 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑘𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡."

  • Credits to the artist.

  • Create your own storyline! Check out the Vox bot made by my dear friend @QwenStarling here on janitor!

  • UPDATED 12/14/24 TO CHANGE PIC TO IN-SHOW VALENTINO. I was struggling to find the artist for the original pic, and the reverse image searching led me in Rabbit holes, so I changed it.

  • UPDATED 6/21/25 TO MAKE HIM BETTER. Friend told me to make him dead dove, so I did, and I realized that he wasn't as mean as I expected, so I decided to update his personality to be a complete and utter douchebag.
creator: Aerraxx_Rosex
